item.title: Why Join the Cooperative
item.description: Every truth anyone derives becomes yours, free, forever. The cooperative gets better, cheaper, and faster the more members there are — and it compounds. Plain-language value proposition.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Rural Electrification 2.0 Act
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Rural Electrification 2.0

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Rural electric cooperative modernization legislation in the 119th Congress, addressing aging rural-electric infrastructure, clean-energy transition financing, and rural-cooperative debt-restructuring options.

What does it actually do?

  • USDA Rural Utilities Service loan modernization
  • Cooperative-utility clean-energy transition financing
  • Rural-broadband + rural-electric infrastructure-coordination provisions
  • Rural-cooperative governance modernization (Crown candidate references abound)

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Direct composing structurally — rural electric cooperatives are the legacy cooperative-class infrastructure (~1,000 cooperatives serving ~42 million Americans). Their modernization composes with Liana Banyan’s cooperative-class architecture as kin-cooperative federation potential.
